description: Composition Purple sleeveless V-neck kurti made of a blended fabric, has sequins along the neckline, armholes and chest, bead and stone work to create an empire waist, lining on the inside and gathered from the waist down Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only La Emotio conveys commitment to provide women with stylish and quality clothing. This gorgeous kurti with an easy, drapey silhouette is guaranteed to flatter your figure. Style this with colour block chudidars or leggings and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
